creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
### WWW

Variation: 

    % pkg rquery -r FreeBSD %e drm-current-kmod | grep WWW
    WWW: https://github.com/FreeBSDDesktop/kms-drm
    % pkg rquery -r FreeBSD %e drm-devel-kmod | grep WWW
    WWW: https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod
    % pkg rquery -r FreeBSD %e drm-kmod | grep WWW
    WWW: https://github.com/FreeBSDDesktop/kms-drm
    % 

– as far as I know, https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod is preferred. 

FreeBSDDesktop also appears at: 

<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-fbsd11.2-kmod/#description>
<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-fbsd12.0-kmod/#description>


### Other observations


#### Terminology

> This version is for …

– might be, more accurately: 

> This port is is for …


#### Scope

> for FreeBSD 12.0.

– can be more loosely described as: 

> for FreeBSD 12.
